sections.paragraph:
& מַחֲשֶׁבֶת f. const. מַחֲשֶׁבֶת, pl. מַחֲשָׁבֹות, const. מַחְשְׁבֹות (from the root חָשַׁב).

(1) that which any one meditates, purposes, or plots, i.e. a counsel, a project, 2Sa 14:14 Job 5:12 Pro 12:5 15:22 19:21 20:18 often specially of evil counsels, Gen 6:5 in several places with the addition of the adjective רָעָה Est 8:3, 9:25 Eze 38:10.

(2) artificial work, Exo 31:4 35:33 , 35 Exo 35:35.
